mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.ATNDLC_MEMO_ID AS studyMemoId , A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.USER_ID AS userId , A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AS lessonScheduleId , (SELECT LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS lessonScheduleOrder , (SELECT LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ || '주차' FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS lessonScheduleNm , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AS lessonCntsId , (SELECT LCTR_CONTSNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) AS lessonCntsNm , (SELECT LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID)) AS lessonTimeOrder , (SELECT LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ || '교시' FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID)) AS lessonTimeNm , A.RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN AS studySessionLoc , A.MEMO_TTL AS memoTitle , A.MEMO_CTS AS memoCnts , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_MEMO A WHERE 1 = 1
